hypothesis: If a two-stage transfer learning strategy—pretraining EfficientNet-B0 on a data-rich, additive-free SEM image dataset of NCM cathodes followed by fine-tuning on a smaller target dataset of additive-induced samples—is employed, then the model will achieve higher class-wise accuracy and F1 score on the nine-class dataset (three NCM compositions × three aging states) than models trained with single-stage training or without pretraining.
